package.name: ee478_perception
package.description: Perception nodes for the EE478 final project. Real-drone target: YOLO + AprilTag signboard detection running on Jetson Orin Nano (TensorRT FP16). For sim verification ahead of perception bring-up this package ships a Gazebo-GT publisher that fabricates the SignboardArray / SemanticMap stream from /gazebo/model_states.
